subcodes.first_line: O ye divine friends! That which ye had written was perused; it was the essence of meaning [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران یزدانی آنچه مرقوم نموده بودید ملاحظه گردید جوهر معانی بود و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
